text: Keep budget plans safe across LEDGER Spend Category rename, archive, and reactivation. Evidence [analogous]: LEDGER G3 and UC-LEDGER-008 preserve stable category identity and block new use of archived categories. Actor/workflow trace: P1 through UC-BUDGET-001, UC-BUDGET-002, and UC-BUDGET-004. Requirement trace: FR-BUDGET-CATEGORY-LIFECYCLE, FR-BUDGET-PLAN-DRAFT, FR-BUDGET-PLAN-ACTIVATION, and FR-BUDGET-PLAN-HISTORY.
target: Stable category identity survives rename; historical revisions remain readable after archive; new or revised entries cannot target an inactive category; reactivation never silently revives an omitted or retired amount.
